raw_html:
set_default_dtype

paddle. set_default_dtype ( d: DTypeLike ) → None [source]

Set default dtype. The default dtype is initially float32.

Parameters

d (string|paddle.dtype|np.dtype) – the dtype to make the default. It only supports float16, bfloat16, float32 and float64.

Returns

None.

Examples

>>> import paddle
>>> paddle.set_default_dtype("float32")
